data.name: PageTitle
data.value: Access

data.name: PageHeading
data.value: Access

data.name: Intro
data.value: Harpyx separates identity from permissions. Signing in proves who you are. Your user status, tenant memberships and roles decide what you can actually see or change.

data.name: SigningInTitle
data.value: Signing In

data.name: SigningInProvider
data.value: Use one of the available login providers, such as Google or Microsoft.

data.name: SigningInAllowedAccount
data.value: If your account is not allowed, Harpyx can deny access even after a successful provider login.

data.name: SigningInInvitation
data.value: If you are invited to a tenant, your access is tied to that tenant and the role you receive there.

data.name: SigningInSignOut
data.value: When you sign out, your browser session is cleared.

data.name: CurrentTenantTitle
data.value: Current Tenant

data.name: CurrentTenantDescription
data.value: Most work in Harpyx happens inside one tenant at a time. The account menu shows the current tenant. If you belong to more than one tenant, switch before creating workspaces, projects or documents.

data.name: CurrentTenantAdmins
data.value: Platform admins can work across all tenants, but regular users only see tenants where they have membership.

data.name: TenantRolesTitle
data.value: Tenant Roles

data.name: TenantRolesDescription
data.value: Roles are tenant-specific. The same person can have different roles in different tenants.

data.name: RoleHeader
data.value: Role

data.name: RoleMeaningHeader
data.value: What it means for users

data.name: TenantOwnerRole
data.value: Tenant Owner

data.name: TenantOwnerDescription
data.value: Controls the tenant, including members, workspaces and projects.

data.name: TenantManagerRole
data.value: Tenant Manager

data.name: TenantManagerDescription
data.value: Manages day-to-day tenant collaboration, usually including members and content areas.

data.name: WorkspaceManagerRole
data.value: Workspace Manager

data.name: WorkspaceManagerDescription
data.value: Creates and manages workspaces and projects inside the tenant.

data.name: ProjectContributorRole
data.value: Project Contributor

data.name: ProjectContributorDescription
data.value: Works on projects and documents, but does not manage tenant membership.

data.name: ReviewerRole
data.value: Reviewer

data.name: ReviewerDescription
data.value: Reviews content and uses chat, with limited editing power.

data.name: ViewerRole
data.value: Viewer

data.name: ViewerDescription
data.value: Read-only access. This is the safest role for people who only need to consult content.

data.name: MemberManagementTitle
data.value: Member Management

data.name: MemberManagementCurrentTenant
data.value: Members are managed for the current tenant.

data.name: MemberManagementCanGrant
data.value: Some users can grant access to others; this is shown as Can Grant in the Members page.

data.name: MemberManagementTenantRules
data.value: Harpyx protects important tenant rules, such as keeping at least one owner.

data.name: MemberManagementDelegation
data.value: Removing a member can also remove access that depended on that member's delegation.

data.name: GoodHabitsTitle
data.value: Good Habits

data.name: GoodHabitsConfirmTenant
data.value: Before creating anything, confirm the current tenant.

data.name: GoodHabitsLowestRole
data.value: Give people the lowest role that still lets them do their work.

data.name: GoodHabitsReadOnlyRoles
data.value: Use Viewer or Reviewer when someone only needs to inspect content.

data.name: GoodHabitsReviewMembers
data.value: Review members after a project or collaboration ends.
